/usr/bin/c++  -mavx -mfma -mavx2 -mbmi2 -O3 -g -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-rtti -Wno-unused-function -Wno-multichar -Wno-switch -Wno-attributes -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-gnu-anonymous-struct -Wno-nested-anon-types -Wno-four-char-constants -Wno-unused-const-variable -Wno-deprecated-declarations -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/G-ForceZero.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/G-ForceZero.dir/UCI.cpp.o" -o /home/sid/Documents/GitHub/gforce/G-ForceZero  ../../lib/libengine_lib.a
